query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "self-distilled agentic reinforcement learning" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism of "agentic" frameworks applied to "corpus distillation" for LLM training, even though it focuses on the biomedical domain rather than the specific "Self-Distilled" variant mentioned in the user's follow-up.
